titleStmt.title: SII 40.147: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 147. (A.R. No. B. 281 of 1931.) Telikicherla, Tadepalligudem Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar planted in front of the Veṅkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1202, Vikrama, Āshāḍha, ba. 11, Monday, corresponding to 1280 A.D., June 24.
Records the gift of land for instituting dance performance (pātrabhōga) in the temple of Mūlasthāna-Mallēśvara at Telikicheṟla by Karadatti Gaṇapaya-Raḍḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubha śa
kavaruṣaṁbulu
1202 nēṁṭi vikrama
saṁvatsara Āṣāḍa bahu
ḷa 11 sō . svasti śrī
maṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kākatiyya rudradēvama
hārājulu sukha saṁka
dhā vinōdaṁbulaṁ prithvirājya
ṁbu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu
svasti śrīmatu karadatti gaṇa
paya raḍḍivāru telikice¨rlla
mūlasthānamu śrīmaṁ
nmallēśvara mahādēvara
pātrabhōgānakuṁ
telikice¨rla Uttarabhāgānaku
peṭṭina Ēkabhōgaṁ callēśvara
kraṁtu bhāgānaku Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkasthāyigānu
mudramu venaka
muṁdaḍigānu
nēla kha 11 pa
dupuṭlu sēnu [I]
ttimi
svadattaṁ paradatta
harēti vasuṁ
ṣaṣṭhi¨rvvaruṣa sa
ni viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi
śrī śrī śrī Ī dēvara
vittiki [E]varenu vijñāmu
sēsinavāru peddakoḍuku
kapālāna kuḍiccinavāṁḍu
gaṁgaka¨rttaṁ kapālaṁbo
ḍicinavāṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
